creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)

I've fixed science/yoda (PLIST issue, *.egg-info is now a directory with files) but I cannot reproduce www/py-urlwatch failure.
Since www/py-urlwatch is a leaf port, we could disable DOCS option later if the problem persists. (Add maintainer kai@ to Cc list)

Can we commit the update?
